problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
